Núria Ribas Costa
Home Work Bio

Editing / curation / moderation

  1. Borders of Possibility with Gabriella Sánchez, special episode for Failed Architecture’s podcast (2025).

  2. Lea Ypi on Indignity and the Fragility of Truth, for De Dépendance at OASE, Rotterdam (2025), podcast available here.

  3. Meredith Whittaker: on Signal, Surveillance and the Future of AI, for De Dépendance at Theater Rotterdam (2025), podcast available here.

  4. Fortress Europe; with Gabriella E. Sánchez, Klaas van Dijken & Wies Maas, for De Dépendance at WORM Rotterdam (2025)

  5. Domicide: The Killing of Home; with Ammar Azzouz, Omar Ferwati & Katharine Fortin, for De Dépendance at the Independent School for the City (2024)

  6. Whose Food, What Crisis? with Jennifer Clapp & Thin Lei Win, for De Dépendance at Blue City (2023)

Research / policy

  1. CIVICITY, Redesigning Design Weeks, for Nieuwe Instituut in Rotterdam and Milan (2025)

  2. Music Policy Resilience Lab and Network, with the Center for Music Ecosystems (2022 – ongoing)

Radio / music / sound

  1. Radio Tempo Não Pára

  2. Operator Radio

  3. Objects & Sounds: contribution to Sounds on Grief compilation, with Bea Álvarez (2024)

  4. Stranded FM

Residencies / Workshops

  1. Organismo TBA-21, Critical Encounters Grantee, Madrid, Spain, February – March 2026

  2. IMI Winter Academy Participant, International Migration Institute, Tijuana, México, January 2026

  3. Writer in residency, Can Serrat, Barcelona, Spain, October 2025

  4. Acts of Sedimentation, with Julia Strömland; Kunst Garage Versam, Valendas, Switzerland, August 2025
